prompt: Create a dramatic cinematic studio portrait of a young man in side profile, wearing a black hooded sweatshirt, head bowed slightly with one hand pressed to his forehead as if stressed or deep in thought. Use intense deep crimson red lighting with strong rim light outlining messy curly dark hair, ear, neck, hand, and hoodie folds, while most of the figure falls into near-black shadow. Add atmospheric smoke or haze swirling through the background, illuminated by the red light, and include a large soft ghostly duplicate silhouette of the same head and shoulders in the background on the right, like a psychological double exposure. The composition is vertical, close-up from chest to head, subject facing left, with high contrast, moody noir styling, shallow depth of field, dark red and black color palette, subtle film grain, realistic photographic texture, and an emotional introspective mood. Keep the face mostly hidden in shadow and pose rather than clearly visible, emphasizing anonymity and tension.
